0.details:
Tasha and I met in first year at University, we used to see each other in the study locks and eventually started being friends
She has always being true to me and never made me fee like I was begging for more
0.model_generation:
My dear Tasha,  
From the moment we crossed paths through study locks in our first year, I knew there was something extraordinary about you. Side by side, we pored over textbooks and shared late-night coffee runs, and in those quiet hours, a friendship blossomed into something I could never have imagined.  
You have stood by me with unwavering honesty, never letting me doubt your love or feel a hunger for more than we already shared. Today, I vow to honor the authenticity you’ve always shown me. I promise to be your confidant when you need an open ear, your partner in laughter when joy fills the room, and your strength when storms arise.  
I will cherish every moment we create, support your dreams as if they were my own, and love you with the same steadfast devotion you have given me. With all my heart, I choose you, now and always.

1.details:
My dear loving partner, I appreciate you each and every day.
You are the most strongest person I know, and for that I want you to know that I will always cherish you.
1.model_generation:
My dear loving partner,

I appreciate you each and every day. You are the strongest person I know, and I admire how you face challenges with courage and grace. Your resilience inspires me, and I want you to know that I will always cherish you. When life feels uncertain, please remember that I stand beside you, ready to share your burdens and celebrate your victories. Your kindness, wisdom, and unwavering heart fill our days with warmth and hope. Your presence brightens the toughest days, and I’m grateful to walk through life by your side. Your strength gives me confidence, and your love fills my heart with joy. Thank you for being my rock, my safe place, and my greatest blessing. I believe in you today, tomorrow, and always, and I promise to support you in every dream you pursue. With all my love, now and forever.

2.details:
My dear husband, I thank God for the day we met. You changed my life so beautifully
Life with you has been amazing and I am grateful for that. Your love and kindness has been a blessing in my life
2.model_generation: My dear husband, I thank God for the day we met. You changed my life so beautifully from that moment on—bringing laughter to my heart and peace to my soul. Life with you has been amazing, and I am grateful for every sunrise we share. Your love and kindness have been a blessing in my life, guiding me through moments of joy and carrying me through challenges with unwavering support. Today, I vow to honor you in all things, to cherish your dreams as if they were my own, and to stand by your side with patience and understanding. I promise to celebrate your victories, comfort you in sorrow, and grow with you in faith, hope, and love. I pledge to build a home filled with warmth and laughter, to listen with an open heart, and to love you more deeply every day. You are my partner, my best friend, and my greatest blessing.

3.details:
My dear friend, I am deeply sorry for what I did. It wasn't intentional and I am sorry how it made feel.
I truly apologize of how I reacted, I shouldn't have left my feelings get in the way
3.model_generation:
My dear friend,

I am writing to express how deeply sorry I am for my actions. It was never my intention to hurt you or make you feel unimportant, yet I realize how my words and behavior caused you pain. I truly regret allowing my emotions to take over, reacting in a way that was unfair and insensitive. Leaving without explanation only added to your hurt, and for that I apologize wholeheartedly. You have always been a source of support and understanding in my life, and I am disappointed in myself for betraying the trust and respect between us. Please know that I value our friendship more than anything, and I am committed to learning from this mistake. I hope you can forgive me, and I promise to handle my feelings more responsibly in the future. Thank you for hearing me out and giving me a chance to make things right.

Sincerely,
Your friend.
3.final_version:
My dear friend,

I am writing to express how deeply sorry I am for my actions. It was never my intention to hurt you or make you feel unimportant, yet I realize how my words and behavior caused you pain. I truly regret allowing my emotions to take over, reacting in a way that was unfair and insensitive. Leaving without explanation only added to your hurt, and for that I apologize wholeheartedly. You have always been a source of support and understanding in my life, and I am disappointed in myself for betraying the trust and respect between us. Please know that I value our friendship more than anything, and I am committed to learning from this mistake. I hope you can forgive me, and I promise to handle my feelings more responsibly in the future. Thank you for hearing me out and giving me a chance to make things right. Know that I appreciate you more than ever.

Sincerely,
Your friend.

4.details:
Hey friend, it has been a while since we last seen each other. I hope you are doing well and that life is treating you well.
I hope you have carried almost if not all the plans you had and that you are still in good shape.
4.model_generation:
Hey there,

It’s been far too long since we last caught up, and I’ve been thinking about you a lot lately. I hope life is treating you well and that you’ve managed to carry out almost all of the plans we used to dream about. How have things been unfolding for you? I’m eager to hear if you’re still making progress on those goals and enjoying every new challenge along the way.

As for me, I’ve been diving into a couple of new hobbies—finally started that painting class we joked about, and it’s been surprisingly rewarding. On weekends I’ve been exploring nearby trails, soaking up fresh air and clearing my head. Those simple adventures have been a real boost.

I would love to reconnect soon, whether over a video call or grabbing coffee whenever we can. I miss our conversations and can’t wait to catch up properly. Looking forward to hearing from you soon.
4.final_version:
Hey friend, it has been a while since we last seen each other. I hope you are doing well. I hope you have accomplished almost if not all of your plans you had. I miss you so much, and I cannot wait for us to see each other soon. I have a lot to tell you but for now I will share the little that will keep you updated. I met someone who has been so helpful with a lot of things, he is so kind and loving. I know that you will like him, and I hope you guys will be link. It has been such a long year and there's a lot that happened but I am grateful for life and everything else. I was able to purchase that truck we have always talked about. I know you will be proud of me, and seeing how much I have accomplished. I hope you are taking care of my baby over there, I miss you guys.

Your friend
Tracey

5.details:
My dear friend, I am writing to show my gratitude towards you. You have been so good to me and for that I thank you.
You have made life to be easy around you, never have I ever felt lonely. You have always reassured me that everything will be fine.
5.model_generation:
My dear friend,

I’m writing to express my deepest gratitude for all the warmth and support you have shown me. You have made life feel effortless. Never have I felt lonely or uncertain, because you have always reassured me that everything will be fine. Your encouragement has lifted my spirits, and your laughter has brightened even my darkest moments. Your unwavering belief in me has inspired me to reach for my dreams, even when I doubted myself. From late-night talks to spontaneous adventures, every experience with you has made my days brighter and filled my heart with joy.

I cherish every conversation, every gesture of care, and every moment we’ve shared. Your generosity and understanding have made a profound difference in my life. Knowing that you stand by me gives me strength and comfort. Thank you for being such an extraordinary friend.

With heartfelt thanks,

Your friend
5.final_version:
My dear friend, I am writing to show my gratitude towards you. You have been so good to me. You have made life easy around you; never have I ever felt lonely. You have always been there and forever. Thank you for being my friend. There's a lot I could thank you for, but for now, know that I appreciate you. Your kindness, laughter, and smile have been a blessing to me. May you never lack anything. I hope you know that you mean the world to me. I appreciate you a lot, and I love you. Please stay as kind and beautiful as you are. And never stop being you, I adore you so much. You have been so good to me, and for that, may God continue blessing you. You deserve everything and more. Your gratitude and kindness will take you far. You are so patient when you don't have to. Thank you so much.

Your friend
Tracey

post_survey.present_other: The type of character the person is
